summary:
Elderly people who are heavy smokers or drinkers have an increased chance of developing mouth cancers due mainly because these two substances interact negatively together causing significant damage over time leading up into old age when symptoms become more apparent; however recent data suggests women may also be at greater risk as they adopt traditionally masculine risky lifestyles though this trend isn’t fully established just yet so caution should still apply primarily toward those most exposed long term via traditional means regardless gender differences noted thus far being relatively minor comparatively speaking overall population health impact perspective .
To summarize concisely while adhering strictly within provided constraints focusing only clinically pertinent information without extraneous details :

Elderly persons engaging heavily in either prolonged cigarette consumption combined with excessive drinking represent primary candidates exhibiting heightened susceptibility attributable predominantly to cumulative adverse effects manifesting late life stages symptomatic presentations ; meanwhile growing but not definitively proven indications hint potential rise among females adopting analogous dangerous practices albeit currently secondary concern given broader public health implications . Agent1 concludes based upon reviewed literature emphasizing core aspects directly impacting patient care decisions regarding prevention strategies targeting high-risk demographics identified herein. To ensure clarity moving forward let me rephrase summary precisely meeting specified criteria : 

Key Clinical Points Summary :
- Highest risk group consists of elderly frequent users combining cigarettes & substantial ethanol intake driving major pathogenic interactions resulting pronounced detrimental outcomes typically appearing decades after initiation;
- Emerging concerns about increasing incidence rates observed amongst younger adult women likely linked adoption unhealthy patterns mimicking historic male behavior profiles remain speculative
